## Validation

- [ ] Builds pass
- [ ] Documentation is updated

- [ ] CodeRabbit review completed
- [ ] Architecture and module boundaries reviewed
- [ ] Performance risks reviewed
- [ ] Security findings resolved or explicitly accepted

- [ ] Human review completed before marking the issue `Done`
